# Case D — expected tree after insert(30) splits the full root leaf.
#
# Median 20 is promoted into a brand-new root; [10] and [30] become its leaves.
# Allocation spec (exact-record compare depends on it): the new right sibling
# takes the next free record (2), then the new root takes the next (3).
#
#              [ 20 ]            (record 3, new root)
#             /      \
#         [10]        [30]       (records 1 and 2, leaves)
root 3
1  1  0  10 0
2  1  0  30 0
3  1  1  20 2
